AWA Training Prices

Personal Training Pricing

All services other than the small group sessions require a 50% deposit to secure your slot, then the other 50% is charged at your session.

1-to-1

Solo Coaching

£50 / session

One-on-one, fully personalised

2-to-1

Partner Coaching

£60 / session

Train with a friend, split the energy

4-Week Block

4 Sessions — 1 Per Week

£180 total

£90 (50%) now, £90 due at your first session

Small Group

4-1 Small Group

£25 / person

Full amount charged at booking

Small groups: organise your group of 4 amongst yourselves, or request to be put in a group and I'll find the others. The sessions are fixed for 4 weeks and are locked in once everyone has signed up and paid.

Choose Your Session

Deposit policy: the 50% deposit is non-refundable and secures your personal training booking. The remaining 50% balance is paid directly at your first lesson. Cards are securely saved by Stripe for no-show billing. 4-1 group sessions are charged in full at booking. Session times are visible before booking, but a slot is only confirmed and highlighted once the deposit is received.
